articles.title: Frontispiece
articles.complete_text:
1928

[This is an artistic frontispiece illustration showing a young woman posting or hanging a banner with "1928" on a tree, with an elderly bearded figure (likely Father Time) watching from behind the tree. The illustration is signed "R.R. 1916" at the bottom.]
articles.author: R.R. (artist signature)
articles.notes: Found the frontispiece illustration on page 3 of the PDF images. It's an artistic woodcut-style illustration depicting the New Year 1928, signed by artist R.R. and dated 1916.
